name: gimmighoul
flavor_texts: This Pokémon was born inside a treasure chest about 1,500 years ago. It sucks the life-force out of scoundrels who try to steal the treasure.
It lives inside an old treasure chest. Sometimes it gets left in shop corners since no one realizes it’s actually a Pokémon.
text: Gimmighoul is the Coin Chest Pokémon. It is a ghost-type Pokémon. Abilities: rattled. Base stats — HP: 45, Attack: 30, Defense: 70, Sp. Atk: 75, Sp. Def: 70, Speed: 10. Evolution line: gimmighoul → gholdengo. Lore: This Pokémon was born inside a treasure chest about 1,500 years ago. It sucks the life-force out of scoundrels who try to steal the treasure. It lives inside an old treasure chest. Sometimes it gets left in shop corners since no one realizes it’s actually a Pokémon.
